title: phyllorkis refracta
intro: Phyllorkis refracta, also known as the "yellow ginger" or "kutki", is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Phyllorkis refracta lie in its root, which is used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including liver and digestive disorders. The health benefits of Phyllorkis refracta include its ability to stimulate liver function, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall health and well-being. Phyllorkis refracta can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
